chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Appeal No.198 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For orders as to non-prosecution at flag “A” --------------------------------------------- 22.05.2025 None present for appellant ------------------------------------ This criminal appeal was filed on 25.11.2024 and it was first time posted before this Court on 18.04.2025 when none appeared, however, one week’s time was grant to comply with office objections. Today, office has fixed this matter for orders as to non-prosecution. Appellant and his attorney are called absent, without intimation. Non-appearance of appellant or his attorney since filing of instant criminal appeal shows that they have lost interest to pursue the instant criminal appeal, which is dismissed on account of non-prosecution. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
